name: example-huashu-slides
title: Huashu Slides
description: Publication-grade single-file HTML decks from the slides workflow of 花叔's huashu-design skill: editorial masthead/kicker/serif-display grammar on a fixed 1920×1080 auto-fit canvas, one terracotta accent, light/dark rhythm, keyboard + hash navigation, anti-AI-slop rules, and an optional editable-PPTX path.

description_i18n.en: Publication-grade single-file HTML decks from the slides workflow of 花叔's huashu-design skill: editorial masthead/kicker/serif-display grammar on a fixed 1920×1080 auto-fit canvas, one terracotta accent, light/dark rhythm, keyboard + hash navigation, anti-AI-slop rules, and an optional editable-PPTX path.
description_i18n.zh-CN: 出版物级单文件 HTML 幻灯片，裁剪自花叔 huashu-design skill 的 slides 工作流：1920×1080 固定画布自适应缩放、报刊式 masthead/kicker/衬线大字版式、单一赤陶橙 accent、亮暗节奏交替、键盘翻页 + #/N hash 跳页、反 AI slop 守则，并可选导出可编辑 PPTX。

query.en: Create a publication-grade {{deckType}} for {{audience}} about {{topic}} with {{slideCount}}, using the Huashu Slides system: a fixed 1920×1080 canvas auto-scaled to the viewport, editorial grammar on every page (masthead strip, kicker with accent bar, giant Noto Serif SC display headings, hairline footer with page numbers), one terracotta-style accent reused at most 3 times per page, alternating light/dark page rhythm with never 3+ same theme in a row, and layouts drawn from the locked enumeration (cover / divider / content / data / quote / two-column / closing). Build a single self-contained HTML file by copying `example.html` and replacing content only — keep its design tokens, navigation script (←/→/Space keys, #/N hash routing, click zones, counter pill) and chrome intact. Use the user's real content, never lorem ipsum or invented data; body text stays ≥24px; Chinese copy uses 「」 quotes. For decks of 5+ pages, show the 2 structurally most different pages first as a showcase before batching the rest. PPTX export: {{pptxExport}} — if an editable PPTX is needed, follow the strict export-friendly HTML constraints in SKILL.md from the first line.
query.zh-CN: 用「花叔幻灯片」体系为 {{audience}} 做一套关于 {{topic}} 的 {{deckType}}，页数 {{slideCount}}：1920×1080 固定画布自适应缩放，每页报刊式版式（masthead、accent 短横 kicker、衬线大字标题、细线页脚页码），单一赤陶橙系 accent 每页最多用 3 处，亮暗页节奏交替（绝不连续 3 页同色），版式从锁定枚举（封面/章节/观点/数据/引语/对比/结尾）中取用。从 example.html 复制出单个自包含 HTML 文件、只换内容——保留设计 token、导航脚本（←/→/空格、#/N hash 跳页、点击翻页、页码胶囊）和页面框架。用用户真实内容，禁止 lorem ipsum 和编造数据；正文 ≥24px；中文用「」引号。5 页以上先做 2 页 showcase 确认 grammar 再批量。PPTX 导出：{{pptxExport}}——若需要可编辑 PPTX，从第一行 HTML 起就按 SKILL.md 的导出友好硬约束写。

inputs.name: topic
inputs.label: Topic
inputs.placeholder: 你的主题，例如：AI 设计工作流的下一步

inputs.name: audience
inputs.label: Audience
inputs.placeholder: 投资人 / 团队全员 / 大会听众
